meta.title: 教育制度
meta.description: Intermediate education system vocabulary and grammar in Chinese: compulsory education, exam culture, and reform.
meta.description_ko: 중국어 초중급~중급 교육 제도 어휘와 문형: 의무교육, 입시문화, 개혁.

questions.prompt: 「义务教育」是什么意思？(What does 义务教育 mean?)

explanation.en: 「升学率」(shēngxuélǜ) means "the rate of students advancing to the next level of education".

questions.prompt: 「升学率」是什么意思？(What does 升学率 mean?)
choices: 升学率(rate of advancing to a higher level of schooling)

explanation.en: 「素质教育」(sùzhì jiàoyù) means "quality-oriented education", focusing on holistic development rather than just exam scores.
explanation.ko: 「素质教育」(sùzhì jiàoyù)는 시험 점수보다 전인적 발달을 중시하는 '소양 교육'을 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 「素质教育」是什么意思？(What does 素质教育 mean?)

explanation.en: 「应试教育」(yìngshì jiàoyù) means "exam-oriented education", focusing primarily on test scores.
explanation.ko: 「应试教育」(yìngshì jiàoyù)는 시험 성적 위주의 '입시 교육'을 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 「应试教育」是什么意思？(What does 应试教育 mean?)
「教育资源」是什么意思？(What does 教育资源 mean?)
在中国，孩子六岁开始接受___，一直到十五岁。(In China, children begin receiving compulsory education at age six, until age fifteen.)
这所高中的___非常高，很多学生都能考上重点大学。(This high school's rate of advancing to higher education is very high, many students can get into top universities.)
越来越多的学校开始重视___，不只关注考试成绩。(More and more schools are starting to emphasize quality-oriented education, not just focusing on exam scores.)
一些人批评___过于注重分数，忽视了学生的全面发展。(Some people criticize exam-oriented education for focusing too much on scores, neglecting students' well-rounded development.)
城市和农村的___分配存在很大差距。(There is a large gap in the allocation of educational resources between cities and rural areas.)
只有___改革教育制度，才能培养出更全面的人才。(Only by reforming the education system can we cultivate more well-rounded talent.)
这项教育改革不但减轻了学生的负担，___提高了教学质量。(This education reform not only reduced students' burden, but also improved teaching quality.)
如果教育资源分配不均，___会加剧社会不平等。(If educational resources are unevenly distributed, it will exacerbate social inequality.)
这个偏远地区的孩子___良好的教育资源，学习条件很差。(Children in this remote area lack good educational resources, learning conditions are poor.)
政府正在努力___城乡教育资源不均衡的问题。(The government is working hard to solve the problem of unbalanced urban-rural educational resources.)
这所学校非常___学生的兴趣培养，而不只是分数。(This school places great emphasis on cultivating students' interests, not just grades.)
过重的课业负担让很多学生感到___。(Excessive academic burden makes many students feel exhausted.)
这项政策旨在减轻学生的课外补习___。(This policy aims to reduce students' extracurricular tutoring burden.)
在线教育的发展，让偏远地区的学生也能___优质的教育资源。(The development of online education allows students in remote areas to also access high-quality educational resources.)

explanation.ko: 「近年来」(jìnnián lái)는 '최근 몇 년 동안'이라는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 这个国家的教育体系___发生了很大的变化，更加注重创新能力的培养。(This country's education system has undergone great changes, placing more emphasis on cultivating innovation ability.)

explanation.en: 「到」must come right before 十五岁 (fifteen years old): 到十五岁 (not 十五岁到).
explanation.ko: 「到」는 '十五岁' 바로 앞에 와야 하므로 '到十五岁'가 맞다.

questions.prompt: 在中国，孩子六岁开始接受义务教育，一直十五岁到。(In China, children begin receiving compulsory education at age six, until age fifteen.) — find the error
choices: 在中国，孩子六岁开始接受义务教育，一直到十五岁。
在中国，孩子六岁开始接受义务教育，一直十五岁到。
在中国，孩子六岁开始接受义务教育，十五岁一直到。
在中国，孩子六岁开始接受义务教育，到一直十五岁。

explanation.en: 「除了」does not belong in this sentence; the correct pattern is simply 只有〜才〜 without 除了.
explanation.ko: 이 문장에는 「除了」가 필요 없으며 올바른 문형은 '只有〜才〜'만 사용하는 것이다.

questions.prompt: 只有改革教育制度除了，才能培养出更全面的人才。(Only by reforming the education system can we cultivate more well-rounded talent.) — find the error
choices: 只有改革教育制度，才能培养出更全面的人才。
只有改革教育制度除了，才能培养出更全面的人才。
除了只有改革教育制度，才能培养出更全面的人才。
只有除了改革教育制度，才能培养出更全面的人才。

explanation.en: 「而且」must come at the start of the second clause, before the verb 提高了: 而且提高了〜 (not 提高了而且〜).
explanation.ko: 「而且」는 두 번째 절의 맨 앞, 동사 '提高了' 앞에 와야 하므로 '而且提高了〜'가 맞다.

questions.prompt: 这项教育改革不但减轻了学生的负担，提高了而且教学质量。(This education reform not only reduced students' burden, but also improved teaching quality.) — find the error
choices: 这项教育改革不但减轻了学生的负担，而且提高了教学质量。
这项教育改革不但减轻了学生的负担，提高了而且教学质量。
这项教育改革不但减轻了学生的负担，而且教学质量提高了。
这项教育改革不但减轻了学生的负担，教学质量而且提高了。

explanation.en: The sentence reads: 在中国，孩子六岁开始接受义务教育，一直到十五岁 ("In China, children begin receiving compulsory education at age six, until age fifteen").
explanation.ko: 문장은 '在中国，孩子六岁开始接受义务教育，一直到十五岁' (중국에서 아이들은 6살부터 의무교육을 받기 시작해 15살까지 계속된다)가 된다.

questions.prompt: 在中国，孩子六岁开始接受义务教育，__________。(Children begin receiving compulsory education at age six, until age fifteen.)

explanation.en: The sentence reads: 这项教育改革不但减轻了学生的负担，而且提高了教学质量 ("This education reform not only reduced students' burden, but also improved teaching quality").
explanation.ko: 문장은 '这项教育改革不但减轻了学生的负担，而且提高了教学质量' (이 교육 개혁은 학생의 부담을 줄였을 뿐만 아니라 교육의 질도 향상시켰다)가 된다.

questions.prompt: 这项教育改革不但减轻了学生的负担，__________教学质量。(This education reform not only reduced students' burden, but also improved teaching quality.)
